basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 29 April 2026 on the official website of IIT Madras. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech. in Electronic Engineering or photonics, M.Sc. in Physics or related field, Valid GATE score
qualification.details: B.E./B.Tech. in Electronic Engineering or photonics, M.Sc. in Physics or related field. Hands-on experience in fibre, simulation, and testing of fibre or photonic components for sensor systems. System Engineering: Design and assembly of magneto Optic quantum sensor. Component Testing: Characterization and performance evaluation of various electrical and optical components. Instrumentation & Control: Programming in LabVIEW and Python for automated instrument control and data acquisition. Valid GATE score mandatory. Industrial Experience preferable.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Madras?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Madras is 19-05-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a B.E./B.Tech. in Electronic Engineering or photonics, or an M.Sc. in Physics or a related field, along with a valid GATE score.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is 32 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of candidates followed by a test or interview.

faq.question: Q7. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job for the Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Madras located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Madras is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q9. Does the recruitment require a GATE score?
faq.answer: Yes, a valid GATE score is mandatory for applying to the Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q10. Is industrial experience preferred for this role?
faq.answer: Yes, industrial experience is preferable for the Junior Research Fellow position.
